javascript:(async%20function%20garminGolfCnExport()%20%7B%20%27use%20strict%27;%20const%20VERSION%20=%20%270.2.0-bookmarklet%27;%20const%20BASE%20=%20%27https://connect.garmin.com/modern/proxy/gcs-golfcommunity/api/v2%27;%20const%20RATE_LIMIT_MS%20=%20120;%20const%20MAX_RETRIES%20=%203;%20const%20RETRY_BACKOFF_MS%20=%201000;%20if%20(!location.hostname.endsWith(%27garmin.com%27))%20%7B%20alert(%20%27%E2%9D%8C%20%E4%BD%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%85%88%E7%99%BB%E5%BD%95%20Garmin%20Connect%20%E6%89%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%AD%A4%E8%84%9A%E6%9C%AC%E3%80%82%5Cn%5Cn%27%20+%20%27%E8%AF%B7%E6%89%93%E5%BC%80%20https://connect.garmin.com%20%E7%99%BB%E5%BD%95%E5%90%8E%EF%BC%8C%E5%86%8D%E7%82%B9%E5%87%BB%E4%B9%A6%E7%AD%BE%E6%A0%8F%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E6%8C%89%E9%92%AE%E3%80%82%27%20);%20return;%20%7D%20const%20oldModal%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-modal%27);%20if%20(oldModal)%20oldModal.remove();%20const%20oldStyle%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-style%27);%20if%20(oldStyle)%20oldStyle.remove();%20const%20style%20=%20document.createElement(%27style%27);%20style.id%20=%20%27_ggc-style%27;%20style.textContent%20=%20`%20#_ggc-modal%20%7B%20position:%20fixed;%20inset:%200;%20background:%20rgba(0,0,0,0.75);%20z-index:%20999999;%20display:%20flex;%20align-items:%20center;%20justify-content:%20center;%20font-family:%20-apple-system,%20%22PingFang%20SC%22,%20%22Microsoft%20YaHei%22,%20sans-serif;%20%7D%20#_ggc-card%20%7B%20background:%20#1a1a18;%20color:%20#e8e6e0;%20border:%201px%20solid%20#9a7b3c;%20border-radius:%2012px;%20padding:%2024px%2028px;%20min-width:%20480px;%20max-width:%20600px;%20box-shadow:%200%2012px%2040px%20rgba(0,0,0,0.6);%20%7D%20#_ggc-card%20h2%20%7B%20margin:%200%200%206px%200;%20font-size:%2018px;%20color:%20#9a7b3c;%20font-weight:%20600;%20%7D%20#_ggc-card%20.subtitle%20%7B%20color:%20#888;%20font-size:%2012px;%20margin-bottom:%2018px;%20%7D%20#_ggc-stage%20%7B%20font-size:%2014px;%20margin-bottom:%2010px;%20min-height:%2020px;%20%7D%20#_ggc-bar-bg%20%7B%20width:%20100%25;%20height:%208px;%20background:%20#2a2a26;%20border-radius:%204px;%20overflow:%20hidden;%20%7D%20#_ggc-bar-fg%20%7B%20height:%20100%25;%20background:%20linear-gradient(90deg,%20#9a7b3c,%20#c4a060);%20width:%200%25;%20transition:%20width%200.2s;%20%7D%20#_ggc-detail%20%7B%20font-size:%2012px;%20color:%20#999;%20margin-top:%208px;%20font-family:%20ui-monospace,%20%22SF%20Mono%22,%20Menlo,%20monospace;%20max-height:%20100px;%20overflow-y:%20auto;%20%7D%20#_ggc-detail%20.err%20%7B%20color:%20#d97777;%20%7D%20#_ggc-detail%20.ok%20%7B%20color:%20#6fa86a;%20%7D%20#_ggc-actions%20%7B%20margin-top:%2018px;%20display:%20flex;%20gap:%2010px;%20%7D%20#_ggc-actions%20button,%20#_ggc-actions%20a%20%7B%20padding:%208px%2016px;%20border-radius:%206px;%20cursor:%20pointer;%20border:%201px%20solid%20#9a7b3c;%20background:%20transparent;%20color:%20#9a7b3c;%20font-size:%2013px;%20text-decoration:%20none;%20display:%20inline-block;%20%7D%20#_ggc-actions%20.primary%20%7B%20background:%20#9a7b3c;%20color:%20#1a1a18;%20border-color:%20#9a7b3c;%20%7D%20#_ggc-actions%20button:hover,%20#_ggc-actions%20a:hover%20%7B%20opacity:%200.85;%20%7D%20#_ggc-stats%20%7B%20margin-top:%2014px;%20padding:%2010px%2012px;%20background:%20#242422;%20border-radius:%206px;%20font-size:%2012px;%20color:%20#ccc;%20%7D%20#_ggc-stats%20span%20%7B%20color:%20#c4a060;%20font-weight:%20600;%20%7D%20`;%20document.head.appendChild(style);%20const%20modal%20=%20document.createElement(%27div%27);%20modal.id%20=%20%27_ggc-modal%27;%20modal.innerHTML%20=%20`%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-card%22%3E%20%3Ch2%3Egarmin-golf-cn%20%C2%B7%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%3C/h2%3E%20%3Cdiv%20class=%22subtitle%22%3Ev$%7BVERSION%7D%20%C2%B7%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E4%BB%85%E5%9C%A8%E6%B5%8F%E8%A7%88%E5%99%A8%E5%86%85%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E4%BB%BB%E4%BD%95%E6%9C%8D%E5%8A%A1%E5%99%A8%3C/div%3E%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-stage%22%3E%E5%87%86%E5%A4%87%E4%B8%AD%E2%80%A6%3C/div%3E%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-bar-bg%22%3E%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-bar-fg%22%3E%3C/div%3E%3C/div%3E%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-stats%22%20style=%22display:none%22%3E%20%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%20%3Cspan%20id=%22_ggc-rounds%22%3E0%3C/span%3E%20%C2%B7%20%E6%B4%9E%20%3Cspan%20id=%22_ggc-holes%22%3E0%3C/span%3E%20%C2%B7%20%E5%87%BB%E7%90%83%20%3Cspan%20id=%22_ggc-shots%22%3E0%3C/span%3E%20%C2%B7%20%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%20%3Cspan%20id=%22_ggc-fails%22%3E0%3C/span%3E%20%3C/div%3E%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-detail%22%3E%3C/div%3E%20%3Cdiv%20id=%22_ggc-actions%22%3E%20%3Cbutton%20id=%22_ggc-cancel%22%3E%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%3C/button%3E%20%3C/div%3E%20%3C/div%3E%20`;%20document.body.appendChild(modal);%20const%20$stage%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-stage%27);%20const%20$bar%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-bar-fg%27);%20const%20$detail%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-detail%27);%20const%20$actions%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-actions%27);%20const%20$stats%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-stats%27);%20const%20$rounds%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-rounds%27);%20const%20$holes%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-holes%27);%20const%20$shots%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-shots%27);%20const%20$fails%20=%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-fails%27);%20let%20cancelled%20=%20false;%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-cancel%27).onclick%20=%20()%20=%3E%20%7B%20cancelled%20=%20true;%20setStage(%27%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%27);%20%7D;%20function%20setStage(text)%20%7B%20$stage.textContent%20=%20text;%20%7D%20function%20setProgress(pct)%20%7B%20$bar.style.width%20=%20`$%7BMath.min(100,%20pct)%7D%25`;%20%7D%20function%20logDetail(text,%20kind%20=%20%27%27)%20%7B%20const%20line%20=%20document.createElement(%27div%27);%20line.className%20=%20kind;%20line.textContent%20=%20text;%20$detail.appendChild(line);%20$detail.scrollTop%20=%20$detail.scrollHeight;%20%7D%20const%20sleep%20=%20(ms)%20=%3E%20new%20Promise((r)%20=%3E%20setTimeout(r,%20ms));%20function%20semicirclesToDecimal(semicircles)%20%7B%20if%20(semicircles%20==%20null)%20return%20null;%20return%20semicircles%20*%20(180%20/%20Math.pow(2,%2031));%20%7D%20function%20convertLoc(loc)%20%7B%20if%20(!loc%20%7C%7C%20typeof%20loc%20!==%20%27object%27)%20return%20loc;%20return%20%7B%20lat:%20semicirclesToDecimal(loc.lat),%20lon:%20semicirclesToDecimal(loc.lon),%20_raw_semicircles:%20%7B%20lat:%20loc.lat,%20lon:%20loc.lon%20%7D,%20%7D;%20%7D%20let%20lastRequestAt%20=%200;%20async%20function%20fetchJSON(url,%20attempt%20=%201)%20%7B%20if%20(cancelled)%20throw%20new%20Error(%27%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%27);%20const%20wait%20=%20RATE_LIMIT_MS%20-%20(Date.now()%20-%20lastRequestAt);%20if%20(wait%20%3E%200)%20await%20sleep(wait);%20lastRequestAt%20=%20Date.now();%20try%20%7B%20const%20resp%20=%20await%20fetch(url,%20%7B%20credentials:%20%27include%27,%20headers:%20%7B%20%27Accept%27:%20%27application/json%27%20%7D,%20%7D);%20if%20(!resp.ok)%20%7B%20throw%20new%20Error(`HTTP%20$%7Bresp.status%7D`);%20%7D%20return%20await%20resp.json();%20%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%20if%20(attempt%20%3C%20MAX_RETRIES)%20%7B%20const%20backoff%20=%20RETRY_BACKOFF_MS%20*%20Math.pow(2,%20attempt%20-%201);%20logDetail(`%E2%9F%B3%20%E9%87%8D%E8%AF%95%20$%7Battempt%7D/$%7BMAX_RETRIES%20-%201%7D%EF%BC%9A$%7Burl.split(%27/%27).slice(-2).join(%27/%27)%7D`);%20await%20sleep(backoff);%20return%20fetchJSON(url,%20attempt%20+%201);%20%7D%20throw%20err;%20%7D%20%7D%20const%20startTime%20=%20Date.now();%20let%20failureCount%20=%200;%20setStage(%271/3%20%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E7%90%83%E6%9D%86%E5%BA%93%E2%80%A6%27);%20let%20clubs%20=%20%5B%5D;%20try%20%7B%20clubs%20=%20await%20fetchJSON(%20`$%7BBASE%7D/club/player?per-page=1000&include-stats=true`%20);%20logDetail(`%E2%9C%93%20%E7%90%83%E6%9D%86%E5%BA%93%EF%BC%9A$%7Bclubs.length%7D%20%E6%94%AF`,%20%27ok%27);%20%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%20logDetail(`%E2%9C%97%20%E7%90%83%E6%9D%86%E5%BA%93%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A$%7Berr.message%7D%EF%BC%88%E7%BB%A7%E7%BB%AD%EF%BC%8C%E7%90%83%E6%9D%86%E8%AF%86%E5%88%AB%E5%8F%AF%E8%83%BD%E5%8F%97%E5%BD%B1%E5%93%8D%EF%BC%89`,%20%27err%27);%20failureCount++;%20%7D%20setStage(%272/3%20%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E2%80%A6%27);%20let%20summary;%20try%20%7B%20summary%20=%20await%20fetchJSON(%20`$%7BBASE%7D/scorecard/summary?per-page=10000&user-locale=en`%20);%20%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%20alert(`%E8%87%B4%E5%91%BD%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9A%E6%97%A0%E6%B3%95%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%88$%7Berr.message%7D%EF%BC%89%E3%80%82%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5%E7%99%BB%E5%BD%95%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E5%90%8E%E9%87%8D%E8%AF%95%E3%80%82`);%20setStage(%27%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A%E6%97%A0%E6%B3%95%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%27);%20return;%20%7D%20const%20scorecards%20=%20summary.scorecardSummaries%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D;%20if%20(scorecards.length%20===%200)%20%7B%20setStage(%27%E6%9C%AA%E6%89%BE%E5%88%B0%E4%BB%BB%E4%BD%95%E9%AB%98%E5%B0%94%E5%A4%AB%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%27);%20logDetail(%27%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7%E4%B8%8B%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E4%BB%BB%E4%BD%95%20scorecard%EF%BC%8C%E5%B7%B2%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E3%80%82%27);%20return;%20%7D%20logDetail(`%E2%9C%93%20%E6%89%BE%E5%88%B0%20$%7Bscorecards.length%7D%20%E8%BD%AE`,%20%27ok%27);%20$stats.style.display%20=%20%27block%27;%20$rounds.textContent%20=%20scorecards.length;%20const%20allRounds%20=%20%5B%5D;%20let%20totalShots%20=%200;%20let%20totalHoles%20=%200;%20const%20estimatedHolePerRound%20=%2018;%20const%20totalRequests%20=%20scorecards.length%20*%20(1%20+%20estimatedHolePerRound);%20let%20doneRequests%20=%200;%20for%20(let%20i%20=%200;%20i%20%3C%20scorecards.length;%20i++)%20%7B%20if%20(cancelled)%20break;%20const%20card%20=%20scorecards%5Bi%5D;%20setStage(`3/3%20%E7%AC%AC%20$%7Bi%20+%201%7D/$%7Bscorecards.length%7D%20%E8%BD%AE%EF%BC%9A$%7Bcard.courseName%20%7C%7C%20%27%E6%9C%AA%E7%9F%A5%E7%90%83%E5%9C%BA%27%7D`);%20let%20detail;%20try%20%7B%20detail%20=%20await%20fetchJSON(%20`$%7BBASE%7D/scorecard/detail?scorecard-ids=$%7Bcard.id%7D`%20+%20`&include-longest-shot-distance=true`%20);%20%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%20logDetail(`%E2%9C%97%20%E8%BD%AE%E6%AC%A1%20$%7Bcard.id%7D%20%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E6%8B%89%E5%8F%96%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A$%7Berr.message%7D`,%20%27err%27);%20failureCount++;%20doneRequests%20+=%201%20+%20estimatedHolePerRound;%20setProgress((doneRequests%20/%20totalRequests)%20*%20100);%20$fails.textContent%20=%20failureCount;%20continue;%20%7D%20doneRequests%20+=%201;%20let%20holes%20=%20%5B%5D;%20try%20%7B%20const%20sc%20=%20(detail.scorecardDetails%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D)%20.find((e)%20=%3E%20e%20&&%20e.scorecard%20!==%20undefined);%20holes%20=%20(sc%20&&%20sc.scorecard%20&&%20sc.scorecard.holes)%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D;%20%7D%20catch%20(_)%20%7B%20%7D%20const%20shotsPerHole%20=%20%5B%5D;%20for%20(const%20hole%20of%20holes)%20%7B%20if%20(cancelled)%20break;%20try%20%7B%20const%20shotData%20=%20await%20fetchJSON(%20`$%7BBASE%7D/shot/scorecard/$%7Bcard.id%7D/hole?hole-numbers=$%7Bhole.number%7D`%20);%20if%20(shotData.holeShots%20&&%20Array.isArray(shotData.holeShots))%20%7B%20shotData.holeShots.forEach((hs)%20=%3E%20%7B%20if%20(hs.shots%20&&%20Array.isArray(hs.shots))%20%7B%20hs.shots.forEach((shot)%20=%3E%20%7B%20if%20(shot.startLoc)%20shot.startLoc%20=%20convertLoc(shot.startLoc);%20if%20(shot.endLoc)%20shot.endLoc%20=%20convertLoc(shot.endLoc);%20totalShots++;%20%7D);%20%7D%20%7D);%20%7D%20shotsPerHole.push(%7B%20holeNumber:%20hole.number,%20data:%20shotData%20%7D);%20totalHoles++;%20%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%20logDetail(%20`%20%E2%9C%97%20%E7%AC%AC%20$%7Bi%20+%201%7D%20%E8%BD%AE%E7%AC%AC%20$%7Bhole.number%7D%20%E6%B4%9E%E9%80%90%E6%9D%86%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A$%7Berr.message%7D`,%20%27err%27%20);%20failureCount++;%20%7D%20doneRequests++;%20setProgress((doneRequests%20/%20totalRequests)%20*%20100);%20$shots.textContent%20=%20totalShots;%20$holes.textContent%20=%20totalHoles;%20$fails.textContent%20=%20failureCount;%20%7D%20allRounds.push(%7B%20summary:%20card,%20detail,%20shots:%20shotsPerHole,%20%7D);%20%7D%20if%20(cancelled)%20%7B%20setStage(%27%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%27);%20$actions.innerHTML%20=%20%27%3Cbutton%20id=%22_ggc-close%22%3E%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%3C/button%3E%27;%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-close%27).onclick%20=%20()%20=%3E%20modal.remove();%20return;%20%7D%20setStage(%27%E2%9C%85%20%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%27);%20setProgress(100);%20const%20elapsed%20=%20((Date.now()%20-%20startTime)%20/%201000).toFixed(1);%20logDetail(`%E2%9C%93%20%E7%94%A8%E6%97%B6%20$%7Belapsed%7D%20%E7%A7%92`,%20%27ok%27);%20const%20exportData%20=%20%7B%20_meta:%20%7B%20tool:%20%27garmin-golf-cn%27,%20version:%20VERSION,%20exportedAt:%20new%20Date().toISOString(),%20stats:%20%7B%20rounds:%20allRounds.length,%20holes:%20totalHoles,%20shots:%20totalShots,%20failures:%20failureCount,%20elapsedSeconds:%20parseFloat(elapsed),%20%7D,%20coordinateNote:%20%27startLoc/endLoc%20%E5%B7%B2%E8%BD%AC%E6%8D%A2%E4%B8%BA%E5%8D%81%E8%BF%9B%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%8F%E7%BA%AC%E5%BA%A6%20(lat/lon)%EF%BC%9B%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%20semicircles%20%E5%80%BC%E5%9C%A8%20_raw_semicircles%20%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%27,%20%7D,%20clubs,%20rounds:%20allRounds,%20%7D;%20const%20blob%20=%20new%20Blob(%5BJSON.stringify(exportData,%20null,%202)%5D,%20%7B%20type:%20%27application/json%27,%20%7D);%20const%20blobUrl%20=%20URL.createObjectURL(blob);%20const%20filename%20=%20`garmin-golf-export-$%7B%20new%20Date().toISOString().slice(0,%2010)%20%7D.json`;%20$actions.innerHTML%20=%20`%20%3Ca%20id=%22_ggc-download%22%20class=%22primary%22%20href=%22$%7BblobUrl%7D%22%20download=%22$%7Bfilename%7D%22%3E%E2%AC%87%20%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%20$%7Bfilename%7D%3C/a%3E%20%3Cbutton%20id=%22_ggc-close%22%3E%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%3C/button%3E%20`;%20document.getElementById(%27_ggc-close%27).onclick%20=%20()%20=%3E%20%7B%20URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);%20modal.remove();%20style.remove();%20%7D;%20console.log(%27%5Bgarmin-golf-cn%5D%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%27,%20exportData._meta);%20window._ggcLastExport%20=%20exportData;%20%7D)();
